message:
Add bitwise operators <<, >>, &, |, ^, function call in class bases

- Shift operators: x << 4, x >> 2 (full lexer/parser/codegen)
- Bitwise AND/OR/XOR: x & y, x | y, x ^ y (codegen was missing)
- Class bases: class C(meta()) now parses function calls in inheritance

files.patch:
@@ -62,6 +62,8 @@ pub const TokenType = enum {
     LtEq,
     Gt,
     GtEq,
+    LtLt, // Left shift <<
+    GtGt, // Right shift >>
     Ampersand,
     Pipe,
     Caret,
